title: Forgotten Hallways
description: Adds a randomly generated underground dungeon structure.
body:
**Adds a new type of underground dungeon to your world, featuring randomly generated hallways created with the use of jigsaw blocks and a large selection of hand-crafted hallways, staircases and intersections containing loot, threats and more!**

Sub-versions may show as "incompatible" on the data pack selection screen. **You may safely ignore this warning**, it means nothing for this pack as long as you are using the **correct main version** and won't affect generation or your world.

- Uses custom loot tables to randomly generate loot, including different loot tables used for different room types.
- Scattered monster spawners add risk to exploration.
- More valuable treasures can rarely be found within dead-ends.
- Generation frequency weighted roughly the same as mineshafts, with sizes varying greatly to keep exploration interesting.
- Is **not** 1.18 (or earlier) compatible due to a change in the structuring of generation data packs.

Suggestions for new room types are welcome. More rooms added with each update!

_Want to ask questions directly? I don't have a discord server, but you can send me a message request @livelaughlord_
